user.title: Create a Device Role
user.description: Give this role a name that describes its logical function (e.g., "Projector", "Balcony").

select_device.title: Select Physical Device
select_device.description: Choose the physical device that will back this role.

select_entities.title: Select Entities
select_entities.description: Choose which entities from this device the role should mirror.

error.name_exists: A role with this name already exists.
error.no_devices: No devices found in Home Assistant.
error.no_entities: No supported entities found on this device.
error.entity_claimed: One or more selected entities are already claimed by another active role.

select_device.title: Select New Physical Device
select_device.description: Choose a new physical device to back this role.

select_entities.title: Select Entities
select_entities.description: Choose which entities from this device the role should mirror.

error.entity_claimed: One or more selected entities are already claimed by another active role.
